# datahub_corp_user (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up an existing DataHub user (`corpUser`) by `username`.

Use this to resolve a username to its URN for use as a policy actor, group member, or ownership reference -- for example `data.datahub_corp_user.alice.urn`.

This provider does not create users (there is no clean API to provision a login-capable user with a password). Users are typically created via SSO/JIT provisioning or the DataHub invite flow; this data source reads their catalog record once they exist.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Resolve a username to its URN for use as a policy actor, group member, or owner.
data "datahub_corp_user" "alice" {
  username = "alice"
}

output "alice_urn" {
  value = data.datahub_corp_user.alice.urn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) The username of the user to look up. Becomes the URN suffix (`urn:li:corpuser:<username>`).

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the user account is active.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the user. Empty if not set.
- `email` (String) Email address of the user. Empty if not set.
- `status` (String) Provisioning status of the user (e.g. `ACTIVE`). Empty if the status aspect is not set.
- `title` (String) Job title of the user. Empty if not set.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this user (e.g. `urn:li:corpuser:alice`).
